title: Mint Green Neoprene Makeup Bag | Lightweight Cosmetic Pouch for Travel & Daily Organization
seoTitle: Mint Green Neoprene Makeup Bag | Custom Cosmetic Pouch OEM Manufacturer
description:
Inspired by modern Scandinavian aesthetics, this Mint Green Neoprene Makeup Bag offers a clean, refreshing design that blends functionality with contemporary style. The soft mint tone creates a calm and premium visual appeal, making it especially suitable for beauty brands focused on wellness, skincare, and sustainable lifestyles.

Crafted from high-quality neoprene, the bag features a smooth padded structure that helps organize and protect cosmetics, skincare bottles, makeup brushes, and travel essentials. Its lightweight construction makes it easy to carry, while the water-resistant exterior provides dependable protection against everyday moisture.

The structured silhouette keeps the pouch looking neat whether placed on a bathroom countertop, office desk, or inside a travel suitcase. With generous branding space on the front panel, the bag is ideal for custom logos, promotional campaigns, and premium gift collections.

Guizhou O'lay Technology Co., Ltd provides complete OEM and ODM manufacturing services, allowing customers to personalize every aspect of the product, including size, color, logo application, lining, zipper accessories, and retail packaging.
seoDescription: Premium mint green neoprene makeup bags manufactured by Guizhou O'lay Technology Co., Ltd. Lightweight, water-resistant, and fully customizable cosmetic pouches with OEM & ODM services for beauty brands and wholesalers.
